name: 1pc Light Filtering Solid Window Curtain Panel - Threshold™
description:
Transform your living space with the Natural Solid Light-Filtering Curtain Panel from Threshold™. The 100% cotton curtain panel comes in a solid color with a natural slub-weave texture that mixes easily with a variety of decors, and the light-filtering fabric lets just the right amount of light in while enhancing privacy. The curtain is machine-washable for easy upkeep, and the metal grommets allow for simple slide-through installation on any curtain rod. Whether you hang it in your living room, den or three-season porch, you'll love the crisp look this slub panel adds to your space.



Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
